text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Argh, what the?! What is this awful pain?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Has my mask gotten smaller? Did I yell too much
when I was watching that last wrestling match?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ugggh... Whatever it was, it's got my head
chiming like a ring bell...
choice_data_list: Do you want to take the day off?
Do you want to take the day off?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ni de pedo! I'm not about to let a headache get
the best of me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stops shouting after that, but her headache
isn't going away anytime soon...
